strengths: Proven expertise in high-scale distributed systems and event-driven architecture, having built microservices handling millions of requests per second and Kubernetes-deployed platforms.
Direct, hands-on experience with modern AI-agent infrastructure, including Model Context Protocol (MCP) and frameworks supporting agentic workflows.
Strong background in fintech and pricing systems, combined with a demonstrated commitment to engineering rigor (TDD, CI/CD) and technical mentorship.
concerns: Lacks explicit executive-level experience (CTO/VP) scaling engineering organizations from 10 to 30+ people or governing external delivery partners.
Experience with AI-agent infrastructure appears relatively recent, which may limit exposure to long-term production failure modes of complex multi-agent systems.
No direct evidence of architecting real-time credit risk decisioning or managing strict financial regulatory compliance across jurisdictions.
response.justification: Bogdan presents a compelling upside case for the CTO role through his rare combination of bleeding-edge AI-agent infrastructure experience and hardcore distributed systems engineering. With over 15 years of experience, he has built event-driven platforms from scratch as a Founder and engineered microservices processing millions of requests per second, directly answering the need for robust, scalable backend architecture. His recent focus on MCP and agentic frameworks, combined with his fintech background at RIDE Capital and relentless advocacy for engineering craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD), positions him as a technically elite leader capable of architecting the reliable, AI-native infrastructure this scale-up requires.
